description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with a dark, rich brown finish and visible wood grain texture. The box features a framed panel design on all sides, with the longer sides displaying horizontal slats and the shorter ends having a recessed panel. The corners are reinforced with visible metal fasteners, adding both structural integrity and a subtle industrial touch. The top surface is flat and bordered by a raised wooden frame, making it suitable for stacking or placing items on top. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, giving the box a clean and utilitarian appearance. Its robust construction suggests it is designed for use in garages, workshops, or outdoor urban environments where durability is important.
description: A sturdy, dark brown wooden storage box with horizontal slats, reinforced corners, and a flat, framed top. It has a clean, utilitarian look with no visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: End view showing a recessed wooden panel framed by a thick border, with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_1: Side view displaying horizontal wooden slats and four metal fasteners at the corners, emphasizing the box's reinforced structure.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, identical to view 0, with a recessed panel and no visible hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with horizontal slats and corner fasteners.
